name: Global Net Lease Inc. 7.375% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Global Net Lease Inc. 7.375% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock is a series of preferred shares issued by Global Net Lease, a real estate investment trust (REIT). The REIT invests in single-tenant net-leased commercial properties. Global Net Lease is headquartered in New York, New York.
